name: Mcilwain School Bus Line
carrier_operation: Intrastate non-hazmat; school bus / passenger (private/exempt for-hire not authorized for interstate)
registry_source: BBB business profile (Pennsylvania corporation); company history page states founded 1947, incorporated 1954; BBB shows business started 2/10/1984 (likely current corporate filing date)
notes: SAFER physical address is Johnstown, PA (1551 Ferndale Ave) rather than the input Windber, PA address (1976 Forest Hills Dr). McIlwain operates multiple terminals across western PA including Windber/Forest Hills area, so Windber is plausibly a satellite/terminal location. Confidence reduced from high to medium because of address mismatch. Fleet 186 power units per SAFER (company claims 300+ vehicles on website). Founded 1947 per company; incorporated 1954 (PA SoS not directly searchable here).

name: Wittenberger Bus Svc Inc
officers: Wittenberger family (Calvin J. Wittenberger founder; succeeded by son Gene Wittenberger then grandson Fred Wittenberger)
registry_source: Wisconsin Department of Financial Institutions (WDFI) corporate record reported via secondary source: incorporated 10/15/1968, administratively dissolved 12/14/2023
notes: Strong identity-vs-location mismatch: Wittenberger Bus Service Inc is a Hartford, Wisconsin operator (USDOT 833591), but the input row places the company in The Villages, FL at 8945 SE 168th Tailfer St (a residential address). Likely explanation: input address is the owner's Florida residence (Wittenberger family snowbird/retirement address) rather than an operating terminal. There is no Wittenberger bus carrier in Florida per SAFER name search. USDOT 833591 is INACTIVE in SAFER, consistent with the Wisconsin entity being administratively dissolved 12/14/2023 (operations reportedly transferred to GO Riteway). Power units and drivers not retrievable due to inactive SAFER snapshot.

name: Grady's Bus Ctr
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier matches found for 'Grady's Bus Center' or 'Grady's Bus' in Bristol, PA 19007 (2603 Durham Rd). SAFER name-search for 'GRADY' returns hundreds of unrelated individual carriers, none matching this name in PA. No Pennsylvania Department of State entity record discoverable via public web search. PA SoS direct search (file.dos.pa.gov) is JS-driven and not WebFetchable. Address 2603 Durham Rd, Bristol PA appears to be a residential/light-commercial address in Bucks County; the entity may be a sole-proprietor or DBA without USDOT registration (intrastate non-CDL operation under PA PUC) or may be defunct. Could also be a duplicate listing of a different Bensalem/Levittown-area operator.

name: Mao & Ed Bus Svc Inc
carrier_operation: Motor passenger common carrier (interstate authority granted 02/19/2016, revoked 11/02/2020)
registry_source: none confirmed; Florida Sunbiz search did not return a 'Mao & Ed' Florida-registered entity matching Wellington, FL
notes: Significant address mismatch. The only FMCSA carrier matching 'MAO & ED BUS SERVICE INC' is USDOT 2577711, registered at 2050 Poplar St, Philadelphia, PA 19130, not Wellington, FL. Operating authority granted 2/19/2016 and revoked 11/2/2020; carrier is INACTIVE in SAFER. Reported only 1 power unit and 2 drivers - clearly a micro-operator, never a school bus contractor of size. Input row pegging this company to 10657 Pelican Dr, Wellington FL 33414 is likely incorrect / a residential mailing address tied to a principal. No Florida Sunbiz match found for 'Mao & Ed'. Treat this row as a defunct micro-carrier, not a viable tuck-in target.

name: Butlers Bus Svc
registry_source: none confirmed for 80 Edison Ave Mount Vernon NY
notes: Likely source-data identity error. The only 'BUTLER'S BUS SERVICE INC' in FMCSA SAFER is USDOT 1633191, but that carrier is the Vermont/New Hampshire Butler's Bus Service (1104 W Woodstock Rd, Woodstock, VT 05091; 156 power units / 182 drivers; Satisfactory safety rating; founded 1949 by Arland Butler; acquired by Van Pool Transportation LLC in 2024 and now part of Beacon Mobility) - it does NOT operate from 80 Edison Ave, Mount Vernon, NY. The 80 Edison Ave, Mount Vernon NY 10550 address belongs to J&R Tours Ltd (USDOT 269824, founded 1984 by DiDonato family) and is also listed as a Total Transportation Corp location. There is no FMCSA carrier named 'Butlers Bus' at this NY address. This row may be a transcription/scraper error conflating the 80 Edison address with the 'Butler's Bus' name. Recommend de-duplicating against the J&R Tours / Total Transportation entries.
